privileged_info_summary: The task uses real AAPL stock market data from Yahoo Finance spanning exactly 502 trading days from January 3, 2023 through December 31, 2024. The data is in standard OHLCV format (open;high;low;close;volume) with unadjusted split-adjusted prices. File verification confirms exact record count (502), matching the metadata claim. Volume data matches yfinance downloads precisely, confirming Yahoo Finance as the data source. Price levels show expected adjustment factors between the file's unadjusted prices and yfinance's dividend-adjusted values. NinjaTrader 8 supports all specified indicators (EMA Period 50, RSI Period 14, MACD parameters 12/26/9) as documented in official references.
